residents_comments: Ms. Norman noted that Ms. Greene has a welcoming way. She brings a refreshing attitude and is an asset to the community of Attick Towers.
Mr. Taylor discussed the need for two new outdoor grills at Attick Towers. The Board discussed the matter.
executive_directors_report: payment submitted to Interface Engineering for their proposal of $6,000

letter and what the mayor is concerned with are two different things. The letter is designed to concur that the HACCP and the City remain committed to affordable housing for individual families living and retiring in College Park.
Resident Intakes (41 completed, goal of 48 to reach 50% participation)
Birthdays in the month of June
decisions: Unanimously approved by a vote the agenda of June 23, 2022.
Approved the financial reports of May 31, 2022, as submitted
unanimously approved by a vote of 4-0, the regular monthly meeting minutes from May 25, 2022, as amended.
Approved spending up to $2,000 for the purchase of two outdoor grills
adjourn the regular monthly meeting of June 23, 2022
Unanimously approved by a vote of 4-0, the Board adjourned the regular meeting
